title: PJ Masks
desc: During the day, Amaya, Connor and Greg lead totally normal lives, but they transform into superheroes during the night and use their powers to fight villains and solve mysteries.

title: Taffy
desc: Mrs Muchmore ends up adopting a raccoon named Taffy after mistaking it for a cat. But while Taffy enjoys his life with Mrs Muchmore, her Doberman, Bentley, is determined to expose Taffy as a fraud.
